Mars+J upiter+Satum+Rahu are in Southern Direction in this
Chart. That means, the Saturn, the Significatorof Profession has
the combination of above Planets, his profession is connected to
the machineries. Jupiter is the male life and Venus is the female
life. Exchange between these two planets it is understood that he
is an Officer in the Machinery Organization with people. Since he
has also the Ketu's transit over his natal Saturn, he will have
enemies, unjust imputation, harassment in the Profession.
